title: Advisory Case A: Sample Electronics v. Example Retail
summary: This is a sample case indicating a manufacturing defect in a generic electronic appliance. The commission ruled that continuous repairs within warranty period indicate an inherent defect.
outcome: Refund ordered with standard advisory compensation.

title: Advisory Case B: Dummy Hospital v. Example Patient
summary: Sample medical negligence case regarding failure to provide informed consent before a surgical procedure.
outcome: Hospital directed to pay advisory damages for failure to inform risk.

title: Advisory Case C: Sample E-commerce v. Example Buyer
summary: Delivery of a refurbished laptop instead of a new one. E-commerce intermediary claimed safe harbor but failed to verify seller credentials.
outcome: Platform and seller held jointly liable.

title: Advisory Case D: Generic Builders v. Sample Buyer
summary: Delay of 3 years in handing over possession of a flat. Builder cited force majeure which was rejected.
outcome: Refund of principal with 9% interest per annum.

title: Advisory Case E: Sample Tours v. Example Traveller
summary: Travel agency cancelled a confirmed tour package at the last minute and refused full refund citing administrative costs.
outcome: 100% refund ordered along with compensation for mental agony.

title: Advisory Case F: Example Insurer v. Sample Claimant
summary: Repudiation of health insurance claim based on alleged non-disclosure of pre-existing disease (hypertension) which was unrelated to the cause of hospitalization (accident).
outcome: Repudiation deemed unjustified, claim amount to be paid.

title: Advisory Case G: Sample Coaching Institute v. Example Student
summary: Coaching institute refusing to refund advance fee when student withdrew from the course within the first week due to poor quality of instruction.
outcome: Pro-rata refund ordered; non-refundable clauses in form contracts held unfair.

title: Advisory Case H: Dummy Telecom v. Example Subscriber
summary: Unjustified excess billing and activation of Value Added Services (VAS) without subscriber consent.
outcome: Reversal of charges and nominal compensation for harassment.

title: Advisory Case I: Example Airlines v. Sample Passenger
summary: Loss of checked-in baggage and failure to trace it within reasonable time. Passenger claimed high-value items were present.
outcome: Damages capped per standard aviation liability rules, but compensation awarded for deficiency in tracing.

title: Advisory Case J: Sample Bank v. Example Accountholder
summary: Unauthorized debit from bank account due to card skimming. Bank failed to reverse charges despite immediate notification by consumer.
outcome: Bank directed to reverse the disputed transaction as consumer showed zero liability compliance.
